title: [MTR4] EuroTram - Milan
description: This is a retexture of the Metro do Porto EuroTram, with Milan's EuroTram livery
body:
## Milan EuroTram The Bombardier EuroTram is a tram built by Bombardier (and formerly Socimi) and is used accross Europe, in cities such as Milan, Oporto and Strasbourg.
This pack in particular retextures my existing Metro do Porto EuroTram, in order to give it Milan's livery! ![Milan EuroTram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4ac23b92714fe97ab2189e5904688d33713475c.png) ## Recommended consist If you'd like to use the same consist as the one that Milan uses in real life, you should put the following vehicles (in order) on your siding:
Single Unit - Cab (Foward) - Carriage (Panto) - Carriage (Small) - Carriage (Normal) - Carriage (Small) - Carriage (Normal) - Cab (Backwards)
Double Unit - Cab (Foward) - Carriage (Panto) - Carriage (Small) - Carriage (Normal) - Carriage (Small) - Carriage (Normal) - Cab (Backwards/Coupler) - Cab (Foward/Coupler) - Carriage (Panto) - Carriage (Small) - Carriage (Normal) - Carriage (Small) - Carriage (Normal) - Cab (Backwards)
## Support, Issues and Suggestions If you find any issues in this pack, have any suggestions for improvement or need help setting this up, feel free to join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/astMcchNdP)! I also post sneak peeks of my upcoming packs there :) ## Terms of Use
Click to expand ## Terms “I”, “My”, “Creator”, “Modeler” or "Contributor" refer to Movies22\ “ResourcePacks” refers to any resourcepack that I’ve created and distributed, whether it was on Modrinth or anywhere else\ \ “MTR” or “Minecraft Transit Railway” refers to the minecraft mod required by all of My ResourcePacks in order to ensure their functionality of working trains\ \ “Model” refers to any models, done in Blender or BlockBench that I distribute through my resourcepacks\ \ “The User” or “You” refers to the user downloading the resourcepacks/reading these terms. These terms apply to The User.\ \ “The Content”, “Resourcepack” or “the Pack” refers to any resourcepacks that the Creator has created/co-created and published on Modrinth or other platforms.\ \ “Discord Server” refers to Movies22’s Dev Hub, a Discord Server owned by the Creator which is used to publish and share all of the Creator’s active works.\ ## Article 1 (Scope of these Terms) These terms of use apply to **all resource packs** and **models** created by the Creator. ## Article 2 (Distribution) 1. You may include this resourcepack into a **modpack**. 2. You may **modify any of the packs for personal use**. 3. You **may not** distribute any modifications to any of my packs through Modrinth or any other platform without my express permission.\ 3.a) You may distribute modified versions of the pack if it's intended to be used within a specific server only without requiring my permission. I’d appreciate it if you informed me of such uses, in order to give you any assistance required!\ 3.b) When redistributing, you must credit the creator and link the original resourcepack on Modrinth\ 3.c) When redistributing you must specify a license that does not conflict with these terms and conditions. If unsure, you may link this license to inherit its terms.\ 4. You **may not** integrate **any resourcepack OR any models within said resourcepacks** into another resourcepack/addon **without my express permission**. ## Article 3 (Prohibited Acts) The user must **not** do any of the following when using any of my content:\ 1. Using the content for religious, political or cult purposes 2. Redistributing this content without any modifications (except for redistribution for the purpose of incorporating it into a multiplayer server or distributed world) 3. Acts that violate local/European laws, regulations, public order, morals or any other applicable regulations within the EU 4. Acts related to criminal acts 5. Acts that may cause disadvantages, damage or discomfort to other users and/or third parties 6. Using this content to represent and/or recreate an accident, disaster, or any other insensitive situation 7. Using this resourcepack for AI training/machine learning 8. Acts that violate the terms of use of the MTR discord server 9. Acts that violate minecraft’s EULA/Community Guidelines 10. Porting the content to any form of media other than MTR, whether inside or outside Minecraft (for example forge mod, RTM or BVE)\ 11. Other acts that are deemed inappropriate/inadequate ## Article 4 (Suspension of Distribution) All active resourcepacks will be listed on my Discord Server. \ Any inactive projects will be archived on Modrinth, **only receiving the necessary updates to ensure that they still work with newer versions of MTR unless stated otherwise in the resourcepack’s description/Discord Server.**\ If a project is archived, you should **not** redistribute it, or breach any of the terms in this document. (specially the ones about redistribution)\ \ **The Creator is not to be held liable for any disadvantage or damage caused to third parties due to the suspension of distribution of this resource pack.** ## Article 5 (Restrictions) If found in breach of these terms, the Creator **may restrict or prohibit** the user from using all or part of this or all resourcepacks without prior notice. Additionally, if the user utilises the resource pack in a manner that the Creator deems inappropriate, the Creator **may restrict** the user from utilising said pack and/or any other packs **after informing the user**. ## Article 6 (Disclaimers) 1. The Creator is not to be held responsible for any damage or other incidents caused by the usage of the creator’s models and resource packs 2. By downloading this resourcepack you agree to these terms of use. 3. The contents of any resourcepack may be changed at any time. You should keep your packs updated in order to enjoy the latest features/upgrades 4. These terms may be revised at any time at the discretion of the Creator. If any changes are made, the Creator will notify the public via the Discord Server.
